description_long: This candle is set within an ornate, medieval-inspired holder featuring a prominent metallic skull and laurel motif on the front, with intricate gold and black detailing throughout. The cylindrical glass vessel is partially frosted and rises above the decorative base, which is inscribed with gold text along its rim. The base and holder are adorned with additional reliefs, including a sunburst and heraldic symbols, and the handle is elegantly curved in a matching metallic finish. The overall design is dark and regal, evoking gothic or fantasy themes, and the craftsmanship suggests a ceremonial or commemorative purpose. The candle itself is not visible, but the vessel is clearly intended to house one. The object combines glass and metal, giving it a substantial and durable appearance suitable for display in a public or themed urban setting.
description: A gothic-style candle in a glass vessel, set within an ornate metallic holder featuring a skull, laurel, and gold inscriptions. The design is dark, regal, and highly detailed, with a curved handle and decorative motifs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the skull and laurel motif, gold detailing, and the main inscription on the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the curved metallic handle and a sunburst relief, with the skull visible in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the glass vessel, more gold and red detailing, and the handle attachment.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals additional heraldic motifs and the handle, with the skull seen from the side.
attribute_holder_type: ornate metal and glass mug-style holder
